nodes.label: Clean architecture layering (dependencies flow inward)
nodes.rationale: Outer layers (app, api, dashboard) may depend on inner layers, never the reverse; core is framework-agnostic and depends on nothing. The platform is explicitly a research tool, not a trading system: entities describe observations, never decisions or signals.

nodes.label: SOLID design notes
nodes.rationale: SRP: one reason to change per layer/entity. OCP: extend via core.domain.enums members, not branching. LSP: all entities share DomainModel. ISP: layers expose only package __init__ surface. DIP: higher layers depend on core abstractions, not data implementations.
